creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 241032
Patch for lcms2

- Switch to Meson
- Enable plugins (fast float, multi threaded)

Backport following upstream commits:
a88767e99bc1b856946229796faf780ec2d5cbef
1259269ca90b4a573a66ba26d85d890d7b7163b5
4e55c55802e4aee5f65be120291f5f4785483d98
1cb1e12fc298b86168ff5606d4ae8d5adb478021

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
